title: Spicy Panang Crunchlets
description: A low-calorie-friendly spicy and flaky indulgent Kenyan dish featuring panang curry paste, prepared with a pressure cooker for easy cooking.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and low-fat milk. Add ground flaxseed, salt, turmeric powder, and ginger powder.
Stir until a thick batter forms. Let it rest for about 5 minutes to allow the mixture to thicken slightly.
Heat peanut oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Scoop small portions of the batter into the hot oil using your fingers or a spoon, ensuring they spread evenly and do not overlap.
Cook each crunchlet until golden brown on both sides. They should be crunchy outside but tender inside.
Once done, remove from heat and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve immediately with a side of yogurt for added tanginess and creaminess.
